ns0:entry.ns0:title: I-Am-Jakoby/Flipper-Zero-BadUSB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/I-Am-Jakoby/Flipper-Zero-BadUSB
Language: powershell
Repository for my flipper zero badUSB payloads. Now almost entirely plug and play.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MicrosoftDocs/PowerShell-Docs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MicrosoftDocs/PowerShell-Docs
Language: powershell
The official PowerShell documentation sources

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Raphire/Win11Debloat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat
Language: powershell
A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ScoopInstaller/Main
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ScoopInstaller/Main
Language: powershell
📦 The default bucket for Scoop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
Language: powershell
Community-driven baseline to accelerate Intune adoption and learning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sycnex/Windows10Debloater
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sycnex/Windows10Debloater
Language: powershell
Script to remove Windows 10 bloatware.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/runner-images
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/runner-images
Language: powershell
GitHub Actions runner images

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bwya77/vscode-dark-islands
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bwya77/vscode-dark-islands
Language: powershell
VSCode theme based off the easemate IDE and Jetbrains islands theme

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hak5/usbrubberducky-payloads
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hak5/usbrubberducky-payloads
Language: powershell
The Official USB Rubber Ducky Payload Repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mandiant/flare-vm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mandiant/flare-vm
Language: powershell
A collection of software installations scripts for Windows systems that allows you to easily setup and maintain a reverse engineering environment on a VM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/AL-Go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/AL-Go
Language: powershell
The plug-and-play DevOps solution for Business Central app development on GitHub

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/Agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Agents
Language: powershell
The Microsoft 365 Agent SDK simplifies building full stack, multichannel, trusted agents for platforms including M365, Teams, Copilot Studio, and Webchat.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/azure-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/azure-skills
Language: powershell
Official agent plugin providing skills and MCP server configurations for Azure scenarios.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/fabric-toolbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/fabric-toolbox
Language: powershell
Fabric toolbox is a repository of tools, accelerators, scripts, and samples to accelerate your success with Microsoft Fabric, brought to you by Fabric CAT.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/navcontainerhelper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/navcontainerhelper
Language: powershell
Official Microsoft repository for BcContainerHelper, a PowerShell module, which makes it easier to work with Business Central Containers on Docker.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/work-iq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/work-iq
Language: powershell
MCP Server and CLI for accessing Work IQ

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoftarchive/New-KrbtgtKeys.ps1
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoftarchive/New-KrbtgtKeys.ps1
Language: powershell
This script will enable you to reset the krbtgt account password and related keys while minimizing the likelihood of Kerberos authentication issues being caused by the operation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoftgraph/microsoft-graph-docs-contrib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoftgraph/microsoft-graph-docs-contrib
Language: powershell
Documentation for the Microsoft Graph REST API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ntdevlabs/tiny11builder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ntdevlabs/tiny11builder
Language: powershell
Scripts to build a trimmed-down Windows 11 image.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: psmux/psmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/psmux/psmux
Language: powershell
Tmux on Windows Powershell - tmux for PowerShell, Windows Terminal, cmd.exe. Includes psmux, pmux, and tmux commands. This is native Powershell Tmux designed for Windows in Rust 🦀
